failures.description: The agent ignored the explicit `available` constraint when planning the catalog search, using `available_only: false` instead of `true`.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Jigsaw Puzzle. The agent understood the overall goal, but at the first step it planned a ProductCatalogSearch query with `available_only: false` even though the availability constraint was explicit and all required information was already present. The correct action would require filtering to available items, i.e. `available_only: true`. This mistake was repeated in the actual tool call and was never corrected by issuing a proper filtered query.
